events.title: May Get Together
events.description: Our regular relaxed meet. Good company, good chat, and a chance to enjoy the Vinyl Menu. Bring a record along to play for the group!
events.subtext: PS. If you’re into new vinyl hauls, favorite records, and gear talk, this is the night.

events.title: QMC Summer Party
events.description: A bit bigger. Very much community-focused. We have the entire upstairs bar at Los Hermanos. Party atmosphere, upbeat soundtrack.
events.tagline: Expect: Funk • Soul • New Wave • Indie • House • Disco • Motown • Balearic • Leftfield
